{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131157233B9D5480493AA698A3"}"},"total":38},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579827627139711768","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"把康熙和洪承畴的野史描述的绘声绘色，感兴趣的可以去看，省的上网搜了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764819652,"group_id":"7466764689762962457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyTVGurBdOZPqQMSA7QS2s4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110845057069","user_name":"喜欢长生花的煌武可"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110845057069","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7466764689762962457","book_info":{"abstract":"【关键词：洪承畴、洪康熙、大玉儿MPV、洪楼梦、陈乾隆、黄拙吾、绿太极、力工多尔衮、】
天幕通万界，《震惊！大玉儿b降洪承畴，康熙竟是洪玄烨！》
康熙看着天幕怒目圆睁，众大臣纷纷表示自己看不见也听不着。
已经用《大义觉迷录》辨经胜利的雍正惊掉了下巴，提笔写下了《大义觉迷录2》。
乾隆短暂震惊后，闭上双眼，立刻开始思考大清何去何从。
秦始皇怒道：“别特么提嫪毐，不熟。”
朱元璋紧锁眉头道：“大明亡了？”
崇祯与众大臣侧目洪承畴。
“陛下，请听我狡辩，不！听我解释。”

_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5552,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":48615,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":419},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1769076298,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585565472727630654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉野史线的每个人物写的都挺活的，故事也都挺有戏剧性的
渴望杀进关内人效仿蒙古旧事，在造下杀孽后，自己种也被人夺了的后金
源于被俘降将与被弃女人的爱情，通过无数下三滥的手段，在利益与真心的纠葛之下走到最后，最后造就新一个腐朽帝国的洪清
明知前方是一片深渊，也仍旧不离不弃誓要为大明死节的明残部
在重压之下不堪重负显得揭竿而起的蒙清汉各族人
乃至达成历史性和解的汉元与琉球宋
真是，一部好戏啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766155577,"group_id":"7466764689762962457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/qGrgulvbZfRWFd5bjSpSn+hxv48UlK3ex4EzrztpqM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4046623230407468","user_name":"阿尔法诺斯克"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4046623230407468","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7466764689762962457","book_info":{"abstract":"【关键词：洪承畴、洪康熙、大玉儿MPV、洪楼梦、陈乾隆、黄拙吾、绿太极、力工多尔衮、】
